message.content:
Write 4 React slide components for an AI Agent lecture. Each is a separate .tsx file. These are China Mobile scenario slides. 

## CRITICAL RULE: Do NOT mention any specific provincial mobile company names. Use generic terms like "某省公司" or just describe the scenario without attribution.

## DESIGN SYSTEM
`{ isActive: boolean }`, `React.memo`, `useGSAP` from `@gsap/react`.
CSS Variables: `--primary`, `--secondary`, `--accent`, `--bg-primary`, `--bg-secondary`, `--bg-accent`, `--text-primary`, `--text-secondary`, `--text-light`, `--border`, `--success`, `--card-bg`
Tailwind: `text-h1`, `text-h2`, `text-h3`, `text-body`, `text-body-sm`, `text-caption`, `text-data`, `text-data-sm`, `shadow-card`
Components: `DataCard` from `@/components/DataCard`, `ExpandableSection` from `@/components/ExpandableSection`, `FlowDiagram` from `@/components/FlowDiagram`, `Badge` from `@/components/Badge`
**recharts is installed**: Can use BarChart, Bar, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid, Tooltip, ResponsiveContainer for before/after comparisons.

---

ALL 4 slides follow the same pattern with variations:

### Common pattern:
- Scenario title and subtitle
- Before/After comparison with recharts horizontal bar chart showing time saved
- Large animated counter showing efficiency gain
- Process flow or diagram
- Key highlights
- ExpandableSection with implementation details

---

## SLIDE 14 — 场景1：邮件智能处理
File: `/Users/soulhappy/gitclone/Kimi_Agent_企业AI智能体讲座/app/src/slides/Slide14_Scene1.tsx`

**Title**: "场景1：邮件智能处理"
**Subtitle**: "从每天30分钟到3分钟"

- Before: 30min/天 — 手动分类、逐一回复、检索知识库
- After: 3min/天 — Agent自动分类+草拟回复、并行检索16个知识库
- Metric: **90%** 时间节省
- recharts BarChart: 30 vs 3
- FlowDiagram: 收件 → Agent分类 → 知识库检索 → 草拟回复 → 人工审核 → 发送
- ExpandableSection: "Agent如何理解邮件意图" — RAG+意图识别+个性化回复模板

---

## SLIDE 15 — 场景2：月度经营分析报告
File: `/Users/soulhappy/gitclone/Kimi_Agent_企业AI智能体讲座/app/src/slides/Slide15_Scene2.tsx`

**Title**: "场景2：月度经营分析报告"
**Subtitle**: "从2-3天到30分钟的质变"

- Before: 2-3天 — 登录8个系统、手动截图汇总、格式不统一
- After: 30分钟 — Agent自动登录采集、智能生成图表、标准化输出
- Metric: **99%** 时间节省
- recharts BarChart: 2.5天 vs 30分钟
- FlowDiagram: CRM系统 + 计费系统 + 网管系统 + 财务系统 → AI Agent → PPT + Excel + 趋势分析
- ExpandableSection: "Agent如何处理数据不一致" — 自动标注差异并提示确认

---

## SLIDE 16 — 场景3：网络故障智能诊断
File: `/Users/soulhappy/gitclone/Kimi_Agent_企业AI智能体讲座/app/src/slides/Slide16_Scene3.tsx`

**Title**: "场景3：网络故障智能诊断"
**Subtitle**: "从2-4小时到10分钟的快速响应"

- Before: 2-4小时 — 告警风暴人工筛选、凭经验判断
- After: 10分钟 — 1000:1告警压缩、知识图谱匹配300+故障类型
- Metric: **96%** 响应加速
- recharts BarChart: 3小时 vs 10分钟
- Circular flow diagram (CSS): 监控 → 检测(1000:1压缩) → 分析(知识图谱) → 处置(生成方案)
- ExpandableSection: "1000:1告警压缩如何实现" — 相关性分析、时序聚类、优先级排序

---

## SLIDE 17 — 场景4：跨系统数据稽核
File: `/Users/soulhappy/gitclone/Kimi_Agent_企业AI智能体讲座/app/src/slides/Slide17_Scene4.tsx`

**Title**: "场景4：跨系统数据稽核"
**Subtitle**: "从5天到1小时的合规利器"

- Before: 5个工作日 — 5个系统手动核对、Excel逐行检查
- After: 1小时 — Agent自动采集、规则引擎+AI双重校验
- Metric: **98%** 时间节省
- recharts BarChart: 5天 vs 1小时
- FlowDiagram: 采集(5个系统) → 校验(规则+AI) → 检测(异常识别) → 报告(合规报告)
- Badge: "满足SOX合规要求" (success variant)
- ExpandableSection: "审计日志与合规保障" — 所有Agent操作有完整审计轨迹

---

IMPORTANT: Write all 4 files using the Write tool. NO provincial company names. Chinese text. Use recharts BarChart for before/after. Each file ~150-200 lines.

attachment.content:
- glm-plan-usage:usage-query: Query the usage information for the current account
- glm-plan-bug:case-feedback: Submit case feedback to report issues or suggestions for the current conversation
- glm-plan-usage:usage-query-skill: Run the usage query script to retrieve account usage information for GLM Coding Plan. Only use when invoked by usage-query-agent.
- glm-plan-bug:case-feedback-skill: Run the case feedback script to submit feedback for the current conversation. Only use when invoked by case-feedback-agent.
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- simplify: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then fix any issues found.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo, defaults to 10m) - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch
